mapper.select: SELECT uc.id, uc.user_id, uc.listening_id, uc.created_at, lm.title, lm.cover_image, lm.level, lm.duration FROM user_collections uc INNER JOIN listening_materials lm ON uc.listening_id = lm.id WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY uc.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT uc.id, uc.user_id, uc.listening_id, uc.created_at, lm.title, lm.cover_image, lm.level, lm.duration FROM user_collections uc INNER JOIN listening_materials lm ON uc.listening_id = lm.id WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} AND uc.listening_id = #{listeningId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_collections (id, user_id, listening_id, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{listeningId}, #{createdAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_collections WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND listening_id = #{listeningId}
